note: Case study results. Identical spec prompt (Task Manager REST API) across all 3 conditions. Model: claude-opus-4-6 via OpenRouter.

run_a_bare_llm.description: Direct API calls, no cache, no guard

run_b_guard_only.description: CertainLogic Guard layer, no semantic cache

run_c_full_brain_warm_cache.description: CertainLogic Brain with warm semantic cache
run_c_full_brain_warm_cache.note: All queries served from cache. Cache pre-warmed from Runs A and B.

projection.basis: Typical code generation workflows have high query repetition. Projection based on Run A/B/C trajectory and production deployment patterns.
projection.caveat: This is a projection, not a measurement.
